evidence_quotes.quote: Please include protection against the destruction of digital-only purchasables, like videogames, license keys without an expiration date and other related purchases that could be taken away at any time if the seller decides to do so.

paragraphs.text: Please include protection against the destruction of digital-only purchasables, like videogames, license keys without an expiration date and other related purchases that could be taken away at any time if the seller decides to do so. I have spent many hours of my life playing games with my friends, connecting to other people and making good memories. These purchases are important to me, and if i want to revisit these games again with my friends in the future, i believe i should be able to in some capacity. I've also bought items and cosmetics in games, and these too could simply dissapear at any moment, it's like buying a new can of paint to decorate your house with, but the paint dissapears without notice from one day to another, with no way to buy that same can of paint again. Please update the act to protect these purchases. Even if it only covers purchases made in the future, i believe it to be a major step forward for all consumers that play videogames (which is growing at a rapid rate!)
